patthana22.18:1.1.pli: Navipākaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipāko hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Navipākaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipākadhammadhammo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Navipākaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … tīṇi.

patthana22.18:2.1.pli: Navipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipāko hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Navipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve.

patthana22.18:3.1.pli: Nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipāko hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca vipākadhammadhammo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve.

patthana22.18:4.1.pli: Navipākaṁ nahetuñca nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca vipākadhammadhammo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana22.18:5.1.pli: Navipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuñca nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca vipāko hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana22.18:6.1.pli: Navipākaṁ nahetuñca navipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca vipāko hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Navipākaṁ nahetuñca navipākadhammadhammaṁ nahetuñca dhammaṁ paṭicca nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekādasa, ārammaṇe ekādasa, adhipatiyā nava …pe… purejāte nava, āsevane cha …pe… vipāke pañca …pe… avigate ekādasa.

patthana22.19:1.1.pli: Naupādinnupādāniyaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā cha …pe… āsevane cha …pe… vipāke cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.19:2.1.pli: Naupādinnupādāniyaṁ nanahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo nahetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā aṭṭhārasa, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā ekādasa …pe… āsevane cha …pe… vipāke pannarasa …pe… avigate aṭṭhārasa.

patthana22.2:1.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakusalaṁ nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naakusalaṁ nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naabyākataṁ nasahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakusalaṁ nasahetukañca naabyākataṁ nasahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakusalaṁ nasahetukañca naakusalaṁ nasahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.2:2.1.pli: Hetuyā cha. Ārammaṇe cha …pe… purejāte āsevane tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana22.2:3.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naakusalaṁ naahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naabyākataṁ naahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakusalaṁ naahetukañca naabyākataṁ naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naakusalaṁ naahetukañca naabyākataṁ naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakusalaṁ naahetukañca naakusalaṁ naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.2:4.1.pli: Hetuyā cha. Ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… sahajāte dvādasa …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate dvādasa.

patthana22.20:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.21:2.1.pli: Hetuyā pannarasa, ārammaṇe pannarasa, adhipatiyā cuddasa …pe… purejāte āsevane cuddasa …pe… avigate pannarasa.

patthana22.21:3.1.pli: Napītisahagataṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca pītisahagato hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.21:5.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca bhāvanāya pahātabbo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.21:6.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.21:7.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca bhāvanāya pahātabbahetuko hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.21:8.1.pli: Hetuyā nava, ārammaṇe cuddasa, adhipatiyā nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cuddasa.

patthana22.21:9.1.pli: Naācayagāmiṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca apacayagāmī hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.21:10.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.21:12.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… āsevane cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.22:1.1.pli: Naparittaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca mahaggato hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.22:2.1.pli: Hetuyā ekādasa, ārammaṇe ekādasa, adhipatiyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane nava …pe… avigate ekādasa.

patthana22.22:4.1.pli: Hetuyā terasa, ārammaṇe terasa, adhipatiyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane nava …pe… avigate terasa.

patthana22.23:2.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.23:4.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.23:5.1.pli: Namaggārammaṇaṁ nahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca maggārammaṇo hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.23:6.1.pli: Hetuyā chabbīsa …pe… āsevane pannarasa …pe… avigate chabbīsa.

patthana22.23:7.1.pli: Naanuppanno nanahetu dhammo uppannassa nahetussa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Nauppādī nanahetu dhammo uppannassa nahetussa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Naanuppanno nanahetu ca nauppādī nanahetu ca dhammā uppannassa nahetussa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.23:8.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā tīṇi, sahajāte aññamaññe nissaye tīṇi, upanissaye cha, pacchājāte vipāke indriye magge sampayutte vippayutte atthiyā avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.24:1.1.pli: Naatīto nanahetu dhammo paccuppannassa nahetussa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Naanāgato nanahetu dhammo paccuppannassa nahetussa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. Naatīto nanahetu ca naanāgato nanahetu ca dhammā paccuppannassa nahetussa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.24:2.1.pli: Hetuyā tīṇi, ārammaṇe adhipatiyā cha, anantare tīṇi …pe… upanissaye cha …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.24:4.1.pli: Hetuyā sattarasa, ārammaṇe sattarasa, adhipatiyā nava …pe… purejāte āsevane nava …pe… avigate sattarasa.

patthana22.25:6.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, ārammaṇe cha, adhipatiyā dve …pe… purejāte āsevane dve …pe… avigate cha.

Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nanahetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanasappaṭigho nahetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Nahetu nanahetu ovattā, tīṇi mūlāni, ekavīsati pañhā kātabbā.) Hetuyā ekavīsa, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nasahetukañca naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nasahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho sahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.27:2.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana22.27:3.1.pli: Naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanasappaṭigho ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana22.27:4.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naahetukañca naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanasappaṭigho ahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekavīsa, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

patthana22.28:1.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nahetusampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho hetusampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.28:2.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nahetuvippayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho hetuvippayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekavīsa, ārammaṇe tīṇi …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

patthana22.28:3.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nahetuñceva naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho hetu ceva sahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.28:4.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naahetukañceva nana ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho sahetuko ceva na ca hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.29:4.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho sappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava, adhipatiyā nava …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.29:11.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nalokiyañca naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nalokiyañca dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho lokiyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekavīsa, adhipatiyā ekavīsa …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

Nakusalaṁ nahetusampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato hetusampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naakusalaṁ nahetusampayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato hetusampayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … cha. (Sahetukasadisaṁ. Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.3:2.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nahetuvippayuttaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato hetuvippayutto dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … cha. (Ahetukasadisaṁ. Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.30:1.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ noāsavaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anidassanaappaṭigho āsavo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.35:29.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naniyyānikaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anidassanaappaṭigho niyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.35:30.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naaniyyānikaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho aniyyāniko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekavīsa, adhipatiyā ekavīsa …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

patthana22.35:31.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naniyataṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anidassanaappaṭigho niyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.35:32.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho aniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekavīsa, adhipatiyā ekavīsa …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

patthana22.35:33.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nasauttaraṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho sauttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā ekavīsa, adhipatiyā ekavīsa …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

patthana22.35:34.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naanuttaraṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anidassanaappaṭigho anuttaro dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.
